name: quick-html-sharing
description: Marketplace for quick-html-sharing — the qhs plugin bundles a Claude Code skill and the quick-html-share-mcp MCP server so vibe coders can publish HTML demos in a single agent turn.

plugins.name: qhs
plugins.description: Share AI-generated HTML instantly: paste, get unguessable URL + viewer analytics. Bundles a skill (auto-triggers on share / preview / publish phrases) and the quick-html-share-mcp MCP server with 5 tools (qhs_share, qhs_edit, qhs_delete, qhs_stats, qhs_list).
